message:
feat(classifier): Add Bun to 5-tier classification + various improvements

- Add "bun" to COMPILATION_KEYWORDS for Tier 2 SIMD keyword filter
- Add Bun package management/dev commands to NEVER_INTERCEPT list
- Add comprehensive tests for Bun keyword detection and never-intercept patterns
- Fix test race condition in env.rs by using unique variable names
- Fix clippy warnings in styled.rs (let_and_return, saturating_sub)
- Add kill_on_drop to executor command spawn for cleanup robustness
- Improve slot release with saturating_sub and warning for over-release
- Add graceful shutdown endpoint to daemon API
- Enhance completions command with install/uninstall/status subcommands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
